mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_POST(ID, POST_TITLE, POST_CONTENT, MEMBER_ID) VALUES (SEQ_POST.NEXTVAL, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, #{memberId})
mapper.select: SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.MEMBER_ID, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST_LIKE WHERE POST_ID = TBP.ID ) POST_LIKE_COUNT, CASE WHEN TBL.ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END IS_LIKED FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_POST_LIKE TBL ON TBP.ID = TBL.POST_ID AND TBL.MEMBER_ID = #{id};

SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.MEMBER_ID, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID WHERE TBP.ID = #{id}
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM TBL_POST) AS TOTAL_POST_COUNT, (SELECT CEIL(COUNT(ID) / #{limit}) FROM TBL_POST) AS TOTAL_PAGE_COUNT FROM DUAL

SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.MEMBER_ID, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) / 10 FROM TBL_POST) AS TOTAL_PAGES_TEMP FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID ORDER BY
TBP.POST_READ_COUNT DESC
TBP.ID DESC
OFFSET (#{cursor} - 1) * #{limit} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBP.MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST_LIKE WHERE POST_ID = TBP.ID ) POST_LIKE_COUNT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST_LIKE WHERE POST_ID = TBP.ID AND MEMBER_ID = #{id} ) IS_LIKE FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID
WHERE POST_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR POST_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
